Identity.Name: StingCropKinds
Identity.Definition: View-crop strategy codes for the Drawing Type registry. Drives DrawingCropApplier behaviour and CROP_DRIFT detection in DrawingDriftDetector. Combined with marginMm and (where applicable) scopeBoxName to fully specify the crop.

Governance.StandardsBasis: STING Core.Drawing.DrawingCropStrategy; Phase 184c crop stamp via Extensible Storage; Phase 184d crop.kind schema normalisation

Value.Definition: Crop strictly to the named scope box. If the scope box is missing from the document, view fails to crop and a CROP_DRIFT is logged.
Prefer the named scope box; if absent, fall back to a tight bounding box around contained elements + margin.
Tight bounding box of all visible elements + margin. Used for spool drawings and details.
Crop to the union of room boundaries in view + margin. Falls back to TightBbox when no rooms are placed (warning logged).
No crop applied — view shows full extent. Used for plans crop-bound by view template.
